omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
If You communicate with Us, by, for example, email or letter, any
information provided in such communication may be collected and
stored by DevBytes.

Personal Information Collected
In order to provide the App, We may require You to provide Us with
Personal Information. Personal Information includes the following
categories of information:
(i) Contact data (such as Your email address, phone number and any
details of Your contacts)
(ii) Device data; and
(iii) Demographic data (such as Your time zone, Your postal address
and location details).
